languages.text: "Я надеюсь, ваш вопрос риторический, Вольный Торговец, иначе я сочту свои чувства оскорбленными. Я есмь проводник Движущей Силы и вместилище ее, ибо так молвил Омниссия". {n}Его мехадендриты впиваются в панель, перекачивая энергию под гулкие слова Первого Гальванического Гимна.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Я надеюсь, ваш вопрос риторический, Вольный Торговец, иначе я сочту свои чувства оскорбленными. Я есмь проводник Движущей Силы и вместилище ее, ибо так молвил Омниссия". {n}Его мехадендриты впиваются в панель, перекачивая энергию под гулкие слова Первого Гальванического Гимна.{/n}

languages.text: "I do hope your question is rhetorical, Rogue Trader, or I will be most aggrieved. I am a conduit and a receptacle of the Motive Force, for so the Omnissiah has spoken." {n}His mechadendrites latch onto the panel, directing power, accompanied by reverberant words of the First Galvanic Hymn.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я надеюсь, ваш вопрос риторический, Вольный Торговец, иначе я сочту свои чувства оскорбленными. Я есмь проводник Движущей Силы и вместилище ее, ибо так молвил Омниссия". {n}Его мехадендриты впиваются в панель, перекачивая энергию под гулкие слова Первого Гальванического Гимна.{/n}

I am a conduit and a receptacle of the Motive Force, for so the Omnissiah has spoken." {n}His mechadendrites latch onto the panel, directing power, accompanied by reverberant words of the First Galvanic Hymn.{/n}

"I do hope your question is rhetorical, Rogue Trader, or I will be most aggrieved. I am a conduit and a receptacle of the Motive Force, for so the Omnissiah has spoken." {n}His mechadendrites latch onto the panel, directing power, accompanied by reverberant words of the First Galvanic Hymn.{/n}

"I do hope your question is rhetorical, Rogue Trader, or I will be most aggrieved. I am a conduit and a receptacle of the Motive Force, for so the Omnissiah has spoken." {n}His mechadendrites latch onto the panel, directing power, accompanied by reverberant words of the First Galvanic Hymn.{/n}

languages.text: «Espero que se trate de una pregunta retórica, Comerciante Independiente, o me tendré que sentir ofendido. Soy un conducto y receptáculo de la Fuerza Motriz, por voluntad del Omnissiah». {n}Sus mecadendritas se enganchan al panel, dirigiendo la energía al son de las palabras del Primer Himno Galvánico.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do hope your question is rhetorical, Rogue Trader, or I will be most aggrieved. I am a conduit and a receptacle of the Motive Force, for so the Omnissiah has spoken." {n}His mechadendrites latch onto the panel, directing power, accompanied by reverberant words of the First Galvanic Hymn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Espero que se trate de una pregunta retórica, Comerciante Independiente, o me tendré que sentir ofendido. Soy un conducto y receptáculo de la Fuerza Motriz, por voluntad del Omnissiah». {n}Sus mecadendritas se enganchan al panel, dirigiendo la energía al son de las palabras del Primer Himno Galvánico.{/n}

languages.text: “希望您这话不过是随口一问，行商浪人，否则我将深感愤懑。我是源力的导体与容器，欧姆尼赛亚金口玉言，将此职责赋予了我。”{n}他的机械触须牢牢扣住控制面板，开始引导能量，口中回荡着第一流电赞美诗的颂词。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do hope your question is rhetorical, Rogue Trader, or I will be most aggrieved. I am a conduit and a receptacle of the Motive Force, for so the Omnissiah has spoken." {n}His mechadendrites latch onto the panel, directing power, accompanied by reverberant words of the First Galvanic Hymn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “希望您这话不过是随口一问，行商浪人，否则我将深感愤懑。我是源力的导体与容器，欧姆尼赛亚金口玉言，将此职责赋予了我。”{n}他的机械触须牢牢扣住控制面板，开始引导能量，口中回荡着第一流电赞美诗的颂词。{/n}

languages.text: « J'espère que la question est rhétorique, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, sans quoi j'en prendrai ombrage. Je suis l'instrument et le réceptacle de la Force Motrice, ainsi que l'a voulu l'Omnimessie. » {n}Ses mécadendrites se déploient sur le panneau de commande, affairées à rediriger le courant, tandis qu'il psalmodie le Premier Hymne Galvanique.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do hope your question is rhetorical, Rogue Trader, or I will be most aggrieved. I am a conduit and a receptacle of the Motive Force, for so the Omnissiah has spoken." {n}His mechadendrites latch onto the panel, directing power, accompanied by reverberant words of the First Galvanic Hymn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: J'espère que la question est rhétorique, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, sans quoi j'en prendrai ombrage. Je suis l'instrument et le réceptacle de la Force Motrice, ainsi que l'a voulu l'Omnimessie. » {n}Ses mécadendrites se déploient sur le panneau de commande, affairées à rediriger le courant, tandis qu'il psalmodie le Premier Hymne Galvanique.{/n}

languages.text: "Umarım sorunuz retoriktir Hür Tacir yoksa çok üzülürüm. Ben Devinim Gücü'nün bir kanalı ve haznesiyim. Zira Hermesih böyle buyurmuştur." {n}Mekadentritleri, Birinci Galvaniz İlahisi'nin yankılanan sözleri eşliğinde gücü yönlendirerek panele kenetleniyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do hope your question is rhetorical, Rogue Trader, or I will be most aggrieved. I am a conduit and a receptacle of the Motive Force, for so the Omnissiah has spoken." {n}His mechadendrites latch onto the panel, directing power, accompanied by reverberant words of the First Galvanic Hymn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Umarım sorunuz retoriktir Hür Tacir yoksa çok üzülürüm. Ben Devinim Gücü'nün bir kanalı ve haznesiyim. Zira Hermesih böyle buyurmuştur." {n}Mekadentritleri, Birinci Galvaniz İlahisi'nin yankılanan sözleri eşliğinde gücü yönlendirerek panele kenetleniyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich hoffe, das war eine rhetorische Frage, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, sonst wäre ich ernsthaft gekränkt. Ich bin ein Leiter und ein Gefäß der Antriebskraft, so hat es der Omnissiah verfügt." {n}Seine Mechadendriten legen sich auf die Konsole und lenken begleitet von widerhallenden Worten der Ersten Galvanischen Hymne die Energie.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do hope your question is rhetorical, Rogue Trader, or I will be most aggrieved. I am a conduit and a receptacle of the Motive Force, for so the Omnissiah has spoken." {n}His mechadendrites latch onto the panel, directing power, accompanied by reverberant words of the First Galvanic Hymn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich hoffe, das war eine rhetorische Frage, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, sonst wäre ich ernsthaft gekränkt. Ich bin ein Leiter und ein Gefäß der Antriebskraft, so hat es der Omnissiah verfügt." {n}Seine Mechadendriten legen sich auf die Konsole und lenken begleitet von widerhallenden Worten der Ersten Galvanischen Hymne die Energie.{/n}

languages.text: 「貴方の質問は比喩的なものだと願う。そうでなければ、私は激しく怒り心頭となる。私は動機力の伝導体であり、受け皿である。そう、オムニシアは語ったのだ。」{n}メカデンドライトがパネルに絡み、動力伝達と同時に、最初の電流賛歌の響きが伴う。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do hope your question is rhetorical, Rogue Trader, or I will be most aggrieved. I am a conduit and a receptacle of the Motive Force, for so the Omnissiah has spoken." {n}His mechadendrites latch onto the panel, directing power, accompanied by reverberant words of the First Galvanic Hymn.{/n}
